CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,559.88 FILED BY BRAXTON, MELISSA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SAKOVICH, VIVIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BRAXTON, MELISSA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SAKOVICH, VIVIAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAKOVICH, VIVIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAXTON, MELISSA $4,815.82 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,865.82 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
